channel.title: SSbreakingSectionTwo
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingSectionTwo, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Unauthorized Access to Anthropic's Mythos AI Model Highlights Cybersecurity Risks
item.description: A Discord group's unauthorized access to Anthropic's Mythos cybersecurity model is being described as more than a standard breach, raising broader concerns about AI-assisted hacking.

item.title: Meta CTO Andrew Bosworth Says He Experiences Stress Only About Five Times a Year
item.description: Meta's chief technology officer says significant competing demands trigger his stress response, and that he manages it through exercise and other routines.

item.title: Long-Term Investors Who Stayed the Course Have Fared Well Despite Market Volatility
item.description: The U.S. stock market's partial recovery this month has reinforced the view that maintaining positions through turbulent periods has historically been a sound strategy.

item.title: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy Built Early Career Network Through a Chicken Wing Dining Club
item.description: Before reaching the top of Amazon, Andy Jassy organized weekly chicken wing gatherings to connect with colleagues, an approach offering lessons on authentic networking.

item.title: Lyft Acquires Gett UK to Expand into London's Black Cab Market
item.description: The ride-hailing company has agreed to purchase Gett UK, positioning itself as the leading app for London's black cab drivers, according to Lyft's head of global growth.
